videos.headline: Oregon seals win on high pick-six from Jeffrey Bassa
videos.description: Oregon goes up eight with under a minute left as Jeffrey Bassa picks off a Tyler Shough pass and returns it for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon seals win on high pick-six from Jeffrey Bassa) 2023/9/9 ESHEET

videos.headline: Troy Franklin makes 72-yard house call for Oregon
videos.description: Oregon evens it up as Bo Nix airs it out to Troy Franklin for a 72-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Troy Franklin makes 72-yard house call for Oregon) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tez Johnson speeds into end zone for Oregon TD
videos.description: Tez Johnson hauls in the crossing route and flies past his defender into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tez Johnson speeds into end zone for Oregon TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
